title: Trump touts lower drug costs and anti-fraud measures in lengthy State of the Union
description: At SOTU, Trump touted health care wins even as more than half of Americans say health care has become more unaffordable for them and their families.
content: At SOTU, Trump touted health care wins even as more than half of Americans say health care has become more unaffordable for them and their families.
